creator: email@manas.ca
text:
Thanks for all your efforts.

I just wanted to leave a comment:

I installed devel/boost-all from ports today in order to build Hadouken: https://github.com/hadouken/hadouken

Boost is missing a file:
http://www.boost.org/doc/libs/1_56_0/boost/core/null_deleter.hpp

VS.

http://www.boost.org/doc/libs/1_55_0/boost/core/null_deleter.hpp

Manas
